base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of magikoopa — a character from 1990 super mario world. Kamek-style Magikoopa — wand-caster with transform-block magic. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Kamek-style Magikoopa — wand-caster with transform-block magic
